scripts.install:all: npm --prefix client install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix server install --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.dev: concurrently -n worker,client "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:client: cross-env VITE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm --prefix client run dev
scripts.dev:node: concurrently -n server,client "npm --prefix server run dev" "cross-env VITE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
